message.content:
Review PR #348 against feedback from previous PRs that touched the same files.

Use `gh pr view 348 --json files` to get modified files. Then use `gh pr list --search "is:closed" --limit 50 --json number` and check recent closed PRs that modified the same files using `gh pr view <number> --json files,comments`.

Look for:
- Review comments on previous PRs that also apply to this PR
- Patterns or issues that were called out before
- Best practices mentioned in previous reviews

Return list of issues found with:
- File and line number
- Description
- Which previous PR had the comment (PR number)
- Why it applies to current PR

Only report actionable issues, not generic advice.

content.text: I'll review PR #348 by comparing it against feedback from previous PRs that touched the same files.

input.description: Get PR #348 details and modified files
Get list of recently closed PRs
